data.content: Revised plan covers all three active-filter implementations: `src/lib/backends/knots-backend.ts`, `src/lib/backends/beads-backend.ts`, and the default Beads CLI path in `src/lib/bd.ts`. Implementation should add ancestor-only reinclusion for `state: "in_action"`, preserve queued descendant expansion as-is, and add regression coverage in Knots, direct Beads, `bd.ts`, plus one auto-routing test for `.beads` repos. Child knots created: `foolery-b4ce` for backend filter changes and `foolery-2cc9` for regression coverage.
